headline: Is Charles Schwab (SCHW) One of the Best Long Term Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds?
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is one of the best long term stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 12, Schwab Asset Management announced the closure and liquidation of the Schwab Ariel Opportunities ETF. The fund will cease trading on the NYSE Arca after the market closes on July 17, at which point […]

headline: Gaming ETF Becomes Growth Fund; Trailing Dividend Payout No Longer Reflects New Holdings
summary: The VanEck Digital Native Economy ETF (NASDAQ:GENZ) is the same fund that traded for years as the VanEck Gaming ETF, VanEck Vectors Gaming ETF (NASDAQ:BJK), until VanEck flipped its mandate on April 9, 2026. The reshuffled basket still carries a trailing 3.77% distribution yield on the VanEck site, but that figure was earned by a ...
